description: A blue illustrated graphic showing two stylized airplanes climbing into a cloudy sky, one bearing a presidential-aircraft-style livery. A speech-bubble at the top reads 'How do I self-deport?'. At the bottom are the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal and the letters 'ICE'.
notable_text: How do I self-deport?; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; ICE
